---
title: "Assignment_2"
output: word_document
---

air_data <- airquality
good <- complete.cases(air_data)
good
clean_data <- air_data[good, ]
head(clean_data)

## Data Cleaning

This dataset contains *air quality measurements* such as ozone levels, wind, and temperature.

We used **complete.cases()** to remove rows with missing values and create a clean dataset for analysis.

The cleaned dataset is shown below.
